title: TowelPack Create
description:
A modpack designed for factory nerds who think surviving in Minecraft is too easy. Featuring a lot of modded mobs, a lot more vanilla ones, Create Mod, two magic systems, and more!

(This is mostly a modpack for a private server with my friends)
body:
TowelPack Create is a modpack aimed at people who like factory games, factory mods and who would like survival to be more of a test of skill than a given. To that end I have included (see below) quite a lot of mods that make basically every mob quite a lot harder to beat, while giving the player a lot more options to kill all of them. Difficulty scales with time and distance from spawn, so if youre not careful, you might just fall behind!

An (incomplete) list of some noteworthy mods:
- Create + Addons
- Ars Nouveau + Addons
- Farmers Delight + Addons
- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
- Relics + Artifacts
- A lot of Worldgen and POI mods
- A lot of optimisation mods
- A lot of Eyecandy mods
- A lot of Balance/QoL mods
- DUCKS!!!!
- Bosses of Mass Destruction
- Bedrock Style Wither
- Enderdragon Fight Remastered
- Deeper and Darker
- Farsighted Mobs
- Multiple Hostile Mob overhauls
- L2Hostility
- Mutant Monsters
- Immersive Aircraft
- The Hordes

...and more!
